name: ai-organisation
description: Managed AI organisation as a service. Entrepreneur submits an idea; an AI team (CEO → CTO → EM → Developer → QA → Security) runs the pipeline and writes real code to disk.

scripts.test: node scripts/test-runtime.ts && node scripts/test-validate.ts && node scripts/test-llm-runner.ts
scripts.test:agents: for a in ceo cto engineering-manager developer qa cybersecurity; do node scripts/test-agent.mjs agents/$a || exit 1; done
scripts.test:handoffs: node scripts/test-handoff.mjs agents/ceo agents/cto && node scripts/test-handoff.mjs agents/cto agents/engineering-manager && node scripts/test-handoff.mjs agents/developer agents/qa && node scripts/test-handoff.mjs agents/qa agents/cybersecurity
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:agents && npm run test:handoffs
